description: List contents of one or more directories. Each directory returns a formatted listing with name, type (dir/file), size, and modification time. Recursive by default (set recursive=false for single-level). Supports type filter (file/dir/all) and sort (name/size/date). Example: {"paths": ["./src"]} or {"paths": ["./src"], "type": "file", "sort": "size"}
name: list_directory

recursive.description: If true, recursively list all files. Default: true.

type.description: Filter: 'file' = files only, 'dir' = dirs only, 'all' = both. Default: 'all'.

depth.description: Recursion depth limit. 0 = unlimited (default). Only applies when recursive=true.
